last_comments: Completed child tickets TKT-265 and TKT-266. ship dev and make dev now converge on a runtime-profile-driven app-on loop: single-node/server-db defaults stay on the web loop, and distributed defaults opt into the full multiprocess loop. Help text and developer docs now describe that same contract. Verification run during child execution: go test ./tools/cli/ship/internal/runtime ./tools/cli/ship/internal/commands; docket validate TKT-265; docket validate TKT-266; docket validate TKT-199.
